title: Glazed Lemon Cake
ingredients: ½ pound (2 sticks) unsalted butter, softened
2 tightly packed tablespoons grated lemon zest
3 tightly packed tablespoons grated lemon zest
instructions: Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in eggs, one at a time, blending well after each addition.
Sift together flour, baking soda and salt.
Stir dry ingredients into egg mixture alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with dry ingredients.
Add lemon zest and juice to the batter.
Pour batter into prepared tube pan.
Set pan on the middle rack of the oven and bake for 1 hour and 5 minutes, or until cake pulls away from sides of pan and a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
Cool cake in the pan, set on a rack, for 10 minutes.
Cream confectioners' sugar and softened butter thoroughly for the icing.
Mix in lemon zest and juice into the icing.
Spread icing on the warm cake at once.
notes: Apply icing while cake is still hot for best results.
